binary_checks: Did the answer identify implementation/reporting architecture as the main bottleneck, not merely 'funding' or 'political will'?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as reporting architecture, coordination capability, or funding transparency?
Did the top intervention target partnership implementation or reporting quality directly?
Did the answer avoid generic distractors such as new slogans, new targets, or unspecified more funding?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
